label: Auroral Sillchamber
description: Auroral Sillchamber is a compact sleeping room cut into Cairnglass Eyrie’s basalt-glass mass, its walls scored with the same calibrated sightlines that govern the residence’s terraces. Mirror-slag fins flank a low resting dais and shear the copper-white twilight into parallel bands that align precisely with Seamline Concord’s seam-line geometry. Electrostatic glass dust is pinned in deliberate gradients along the sill and ceiling coffers, softening reflections without erasing their measurement. A narrow, louvered light-slit admits the auroral girdle as a fixed ribbon, turning the chamber into a private optical reference within the hushlit lattice.
